description: bake a fixed batch dimension into a batch-1 ONNX — patch input/output batch dims and internal Reshape nodes, writing a new static-batch ONNX
rules: BATCH_SIZE must be a positive integer; the impl rejects zero/negative/non-numeric values
Reshape nodes whose first shape dim is 1 are rewritten to the target batch size so the static graph stays consistent
Source ONNX is never modified in place — the patched model is written to a separate destination path
usage: Set SRC_ONNX (batch-1 ONNX), BATCH_SIZE (positive int), and optionally DST_ONNX (defaults to ${RECORD_STORE}/model_b{BATCH_SIZE}.onnx). Output: the static-batch ONNX at the destination plus static-batch-onnx.json (audit manifest).
limitation: Requires the `onnx` and `numpy` python packages to actually rewrite the graph; without them the perk degrades gracefully (no .onnx written, wrote_output=false). Assumes the source is a valid batch-1 ONNX with batch as dim[0].
